projects.name: GenericAgent
projects.risk: Unproven runtime; keep isolated until reviewed.
projects.notes: Treat as architecture reference before direct integration.

projects.name: 9router
projects.risk: Canonical repo uncertain; registry marks discovered template only.
projects.notes: Replace with canonical repository when verified.

projects.name: hello-agents
projects.role: Examples and teaching material for local skills.
projects.risk: Large tutorial repo; avoid runtime dependency.
projects.notes: Use to seed examples in brain-skills.

projects.name: claude-context
projects.role: Semantic code search and context retrieval.
projects.risk: Indexing cost and dependency footprint need review.

projects.name: hermes-agent
projects.risk: Canonical hermes-agent repo uncertain from GitHub search.
projects.notes: Keep as placeholder until canonical repo is verified.

projects.name: Agentmemory
projects.risk: Memory schema and privacy controls must be audited.

projects.name: UI-TARS-desktop
projects.risk: High-risk action layer; observation-only by default.
projects.notes: Do not enable auto-clicking without confirmation gate.

projects.name: browserbase/skills
projects.risk: Cloud-browser assumptions may not match local-first goal.
projects.notes: Use patterns, not cloud dependency, for brain-skills.

projects.name: Chrome DevTools MCP
projects.role: Browser diagnostics for console, network, DOM, screenshots.
projects.risk: Browser session access requires explicit user consent.

projects.name: Mirage
projects.role: Unified virtual filesystem for agent context.
projects.notes: Primary candidate for brain-context workspace abstraction.

projects.name: Khoj
projects.role: Personal AI assistant and second-brain reference.
projects.risk: May overlap with local brain UI and memory scope.
projects.notes: Use to compare personal knowledge workflows.

projects.name: Open WebUI
projects.role: Local model UI, tool, and pipeline reference.
projects.risk: Large app; avoid making it the core brain runtime.
projects.notes: Reference UI and local model operations.

projects.name: AnythingLLM
projects.role: Document workspace and local RAG reference.
projects.risk: Large workspace app; isolate before integration.
projects.notes: Compare document ingestion and workspace concepts.

projects.name: Open Interpreter
projects.risk: Command execution must remain behind confirmation.

projects.name: Jan
projects.risk: Desktop app scope may compete with our control plane.
projects.notes: Watch for local model management ideas.

projects.name: OpenCLAW
projects.risk: Research-agent scope may be too broad for v1.
projects.notes: Use for research workflow patterns only.

projects.name: code2art museum
projects.role: Reference exhibit protocol, light museum layer, agent guide, and immersive 3D space mode.
projects.risk: Use as reference architecture only; keep third-party source isolated from local brain runtime.
projects.notes: Pinned at commit 7505129c3a54b9cd8ea43e5edee247f60098c85d. Adapted into workspace/personal-brain-gallery.html and workspace/personal-brain-exhibits.json as a local-first personal brain gallery prototype.
